Name: sqlx
Description:
- Announce a category
- Draw a card
- If it doesn't match: discard it.

repeat up to 3 times.

Name: winit
Description: Gets +1pt. Gets +1pt when hidden.

Name: wgpu
Description: Vote for the best visible card design, that card gets +1pt, other players draw a card.

Name: dotenvy
Description: Draw a card, activate a card if you just drew a technique.

Name: pyo3
Description: If an opponent has no visible cards touching each other, gets +1pt.

Name: pest
Description: If this gets hidden, adds 2 pts to another card.

Name: opentelemetry
Description: Previous player announce the category they intend to play next turn. If they lied, they must hide a card.

Name: tonic
Description: Choose a player. They activate one of your cards, you activate one of theirs, steal on success.

Name: web-sys
Description: Look at the top 3 cards of your draw pile. Draw one, discard one, put one back.

Name: petgraph
Description: Link 2 allied cards, if one is hidden or discarded, both are.

Name: humantime
Description: The player who lives the farthest draw an aditional card.

Name: tower
Description: Hide a card, put a visible card from an opponent in you discard pile.

Name: crossbeam
Description: Discard a card in hand, draw a card.

Name: zeroize
Description: Set a crate's points to 0.

Name: ehttp
Description: Draw a card from an opponent's draw pile.

Name: reqwest
Description: Draw a card from an opponent's discard pile.

Name: nom
Description: Activate a card, draw a card, discard a visible card.

Name: tracing
Description: Passive: Gets +1pt for each visible card on next player's side.

Name: futures
Description: Next player activates a card.

Name: tokio
Description: Play 1 additional card now.

Name: toml
Description: Passive: Gets -1pt pour each of your other visible crates.

Name: semver
Description: Gain 1pt for each other visible card with exactly 1pt.

Name: hyper
Description: Next player plays 1 card but set its points to 1.

Name: rustls
Description: Play hidden, Activate this on another player's turn to hide their played card.

Name: log
Description: Passive: Each time you draw a card, announce its category.

Name: smallvec
Description: Every players with more than 2 cards in hand discard a visible card and play a card, but hidden.

Name: ryu
Description: If you have an odd points count in the member category, draw a card.

Name: clap
Description: Next player must play a technique, or draw a card.

Name: strsim
Description: Announce a category in your hand, if next player has it too, you both play a card from that category.

Name: rand
Description: Draw a card from your opponent's hand.

Name: thiserror
Description: Every player hide a card.

Name: regex
Description: Hide a card, draw a card.

Name: serde
Description: Activate a card, discard a card from your hand.

Name: libc
Description: Discard a card from your hand. Draw a card from another player's draw pile.

Name: indexmap
Description: Announce a category, every player must play a card of this category, or hide a card.

Name: itertools
Description: Activate a card.

Name: base64
Description: Hide a card.

Name: bitflag
Description: Play 2 other cards, but set their points to 1 after your turn.

Name: syn
Description: Passive: Next player must announce the category of the cards they draw.
